system.description: As a standard action, the creature may choose to subtract 4 from its melee attack roll and deliver an awesome blow.
system.prerequisites: Str 25, Power Attack, Improved Bull Rush, size Large or larger
system.benefit: If the creature hits a Huge or smaller opponent with an awesome blow, the opponent must succeed on a Fortitude save (DC = damage dealt) or be knocked flying 10 feet in a direction of the attacker’s choice and fall prone.
